title: geijera paniculata
intro: Geijera paniculata, also known as the Australian willow or willow-peely, is a small tree or shrub native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Geijera paniculata include treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as soothing digestive problems and reducing pain. Geijera paniculata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments.
